titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of Facilities, Yale University, Records
Office of Facilities, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 13, 2020 at 10:29

did.unittitle: Office of Facilities, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of project files of the Director of Facilities Construction Organization and requests for service documenting the activities of the Yale Office of Facilities.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 46-A (YRG 46-A), Records and materials broadly documenting Yale buildings, facilities, and grounds.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the records is partially restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of Facilities, Yale University, Records (RU 8). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of project files of the Director of Facilities Construction Organization and requests for service documenting the activities of the Yale Office of Facilities.

did.unittitle: Engineering Service Requests and operating manuals
Estimated Service Requests (ESR) and director and project manager files
Housing- Whitney Colleges: Program, Schedule, Miscellaneous1968-73

Advisory Committee on Band G- New Haven Preservation Trust Data 1972-74,1978

SHM-Sterling Hall of Medicine: Cll Wing Renovation-Accounts "
Cancer Center Project-Cedar st. Bridge, Hunter Bldg. Addition-Winchester Renovation-George E. Fuller Co. Estimate
Index of General Contractors and Subcontractors

Design Standards for Materials-Notes to Bidders

WLH-WML Harkness Hall: Basement Renovation, Payroll
